content.problemStatement:
You have a welcome message, "welcome to the Python programming course!", and you’d like to personalize it by adding a person’s name "John".

After combining the name and the message, you want to convert it entirely to lowercase.

`welcome to the python programming course! john
`
constraints: The output string length does not exceed 100 characters.
content.outputFormat: Print the lower‑cased greeting: "welcome to the python programming course! john"

sampleTestCases.output: welcome to the python programming course! john
sampleTestCases.explanation: The program prints the fixed lower‑cased greeting.

hidden.label: no input
hidden.expectedOutput: welcome to the python programming course! john

hidden.label: Case 2
hidden.expectedOutput: welcome to the python programming course! john

hidden.label: Case 3
hidden.expectedOutput: welcome to the python programming course! john

hidden.label: Case 4
hidden.expectedOutput: welcome to the python programming course! john

hidden.label: Case 5
hidden.expectedOutput: welcome to the python programming course! john

solution.approach: The program does not need to process any input. It directly prints the required fixed string in lower case.

code.Java: public class Main{public static void main(String[] args){System.out.println("welcome to the python programming course! john");}}
code.JavaScript:
const output = "welcome to the python programming course! john";
console.log(output);
